final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input S0,
    input S1,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) = (~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C);
  wire temp2_(S1 & S0 & D) = (S1 & S0 & D);
  assign Y = temp1_(~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) | temp2_(S1 & S0 & D);

endmodule
